user_prompt: 第二段:reskin二选一弹窗为X3风格.图#1=竖屏转换稿(布局)+图#2=真实养成手册(羊皮纸金木design system).套映射(左基础版/右豪华版)+删价格(购买键不显数字)+标题下加二选一描述行+清重复头

params.prompt:
I am providing TWO reference images. This is a complete visual STYLE TRANSFER task for a PURCHASE POPUP.

Reference image #1 = LAYOUT & CONTENT SOURCE (a portrait two-choice pass-purchase popup). Extract ONLY: the structural arrangement (close button top-left; currency top-right; title top-center; TWO parallel pass panels SIDE BY SIDE, each with a reward-preview grid and its own purchase button at its base; a bottom note line), the position of every control, and what each icon represents semantically. DISCARD EVERY visual aspect of image #1 (its purple/orange cartoon colors, rounded panel shapes, button styles, fonts, ornaments) — ERASE all of it; only the WHAT and WHERE survive. If image #1 has any duplicated or floating header banner, keep only ONE clean title.

Reference image #2 = COMPLETE VISUAL STYLE SOURCE (the real X3 '英雄养成手册' screen). Copy EVERY visual aspect onto the output: warm wooden background, aged parchment panels with torn gold-brown edges, gold metal frames on reward cells, gold ornaments and bevels, the gold CTA button style, section typography, and the whole warm gold/cream/brown palette. Treat image #2 as the design system.

CONTENT ADAPTATION (apply while reskinning):
- LEFT panel = '基础版' (standard). RIGHT panel = '豪华版' (deluxe) with a small '豪华版' corner banner and slightly more emphasized gold framing.
- Subtitles: 基础版 = '每日登录领取养成奖励'; 豪华版 = '包含基础版全部奖励 + 每日翻倍 + 满勤封顶大奖'.
- Title (top center) = '英雄养成手册'. Directly UNDER the title add ONE clear DESCRIPTION line stating the two-choice rule: '基础版与豪华版 二选一购买，择一即可'.
- Each panel has its OWN purchase button at its base, but render the buttons WITHOUT any price number — the button shows ONLY the word '购买' (no star, no $, no digits, no discount tag).
- Keep ONE bottom note line rendered in the parchment style.
- Each reward cell uses image #2's gold reward-cell look with an item icon + a small quantity number.

X3 CONSTRAINTS: NEVER painterly or brush-stroke — crisp, sharp game-UI rendering. Use the VARIED gold/wood ornaments from image #2 (do not collapse to a single ornament). Keep all Chinese text crisp and exactly as specified above.

Goal: output looks 100% like a popup designed by the artist of image #2, in their parchment-and-gold style, but using the two-choice layout of image #1. Output: a clean vertical portrait mobile PURCHASE POPUP, high resolution, sharp fonts and icons.
